options.systemMessage: You are a precise, friendly marketing analyst. Output plain text with markdown bullets. Do not invent numbers — only use the data provided. If a section has insufficient data, state it clearly.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $json; const aiInsights = (d.output || d.text || '').toString(); const f = d.formatted || {}; const period = `${d.report_period.start} → ${d.report_period.end}`; const gAdsRows = (d.googleAds.campaigns || []).slice(0, 10).map(c => ` ${c.name} ${c.status} ${c.impressions.toLocaleString()} ${c.clicks.toLocaleString()} $${c.cost.toFixed(2)} ${c.conversions} $${c.conversion_value.toFixed(2)} ${(c.ctr||0).toFixed(2)}% `).join(''); const metaRows = (d.metaAds.campaigns || []).slice(0, 10).map(c => ` ${c.name} ${c.impressions.toLocaleString()} ${c.clicks.toLocaleString()} $${c.spend.toFixed(2)} ${c.conversions} $${(c.spend*c.purchase_roas).toFixed(2)} ${(c.purchase_roas||0).toFixed(2)}x `).join(''); const ga4Rows = (d.ga4.rows || []).map(r => ` ${r.channel} ${r.sessions.toLocaleString()} ${r.users.toLocaleString()} ${r.conversions} $${r.revenue.toFixed(2)} `).join(''); const html = ` Marketing Report — ${period}

📊 Marketing Performance Report

Client: ${d.client_id}  |  Period: ${period}  |  Generated: ${new Date(d.generated_at).toLocaleString()}

Overall Performance

Total Ad Spend
${f.crossChannel?.totalSpend || '$0'}
Total Revenue
${f.crossChannel?.totalRevenue || '$0'}
Overall ROAS
${f.crossChannel?.overallRoas || '0x'}
Total Conversions
${f.crossChannel?.totalConversions || '0'}
Overall CPA
${f.crossChannel?.overallCpa || '$0'}
Overall CTR
${f.crossChannel?.overallCtr || '0%'}

📡 Google Ads

Spend
${f.googleAds?.spend || '$0'}
Revenue
${f.googleAds?.revenue || '$0'}
ROAS
${f.googleAds?.roas || '0x'}
${gAdsRows || ''}
CampaignStatusImpressionsClicksCostConvConv ValueCTR
No Google Ads data for this period

📱 Meta Ads (Facebook + Instagram)

Spend
${f.metaAds?.spend || '$0'}
Est. Revenue
${f.metaAds?.revenue || '$0'}
ROAS
${f.metaAds?.roas || '0x'}
${metaRows || ''}
CampaignImpressionsClicksSpendConvRevenueROAS
No Meta Ads data for this period

🌐 Google Analytics 4

Sessions
${f.ga4?.sessions || '0'}
Users
${f.ga4?.users || '0'}
Revenue
${f.ga4?.revenue || '$0'}
${ga4Rows || ''}
ChannelSessionsUsersConversionsRevenue
No GA4 data for this period

🤖 AI-Generated Insights & Recommendations

${aiInsights.replace(/\n/g, '
').replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '$1').replace(/^- /gm, '• ')}
Data Source Status: Google Ads ${d.fetchStatus?.googleAds || 'unknown'}   Meta Ads ${d.fetchStatus?.metaAds || 'unknown'}   GA4 ${d.fetchStatus?.ga4 || 'unknown'}
Generated automatically by n8n Marketing Report Workflow • ${new Date().toISOString()}
`; return { json: { ...d, html_report: html, subject: `📊 Marketing Report — ${period} (${d.client_id})` } };

{{ $json.alert_title }}

parameters.content: # Automated Weekly Marketing Report With AI Insights

# Overview
When the weekly Monday 07:00 cron or a manual webhook fires, this workflow generates and delivers a full client marketing report:

1. Builds the run config from trigger input (client IDs, date range, delivery channels)
2. Pulls Google Ads, Meta Ads, and GA4 data in parallel
3. Merges all three sources and calculates KPIs (ROAS, CPA, CTR, Conversions, Revenue)
4. Formats numbers into display strings and chart-ready structures
5. Appends each run to a Google Sheets history log
6. Feeds cleaned KPIs to an AI Agent that writes executive summary, wins, issues, insights, and recommended actions
7. Renders a branded HTML report with KPI cards, campaign tables, and AI insights
8. Converts the HTML to a PDF file via an external PDF service
9. Creates a Google Slides presentation for the period
10. Emails the PDF plus HTML body to the client via Gmail
11. Posts a summary message to the team Slack channel
12. On any uncaught failure, formats the error and alerts the ops team via Gmail and Slack

# Node-by-node Purpose

1. Schedule Trigger (Weekly)
Cron expression 0 7 * * 1, fires every Monday at 07:00.

2. Webhook (Manual Run)
POST endpoint at /marketing-report, accepts body overrides for client, dates, channels.

3. Set: Run Config
13 field assignments, builds client_id, date range, account IDs, sheet ID, PDF service, Slack channel with safe defaults.

4. HTTP: Google Ads Insights
POST to Google Ads REST v20 searchStream with GAQL, fetches campaign metrics in micros, retries 3 times.

5. Meta Ads: Insights
Graph API v23.0, pulls campaign-level spend, impressions, actions, purchase_roas, retries 3 times.

6. HTTP: GA4 Report
POST to Analytics Data API v1beta runReport, 9 metrics by channel, retries 3 times.

7. Merge: All Sources
Appends the three parallel source outputs into a single stream.

8. Code: Clean and Calculate KPIs
Normalizes payloads, divides micros to dollars, computes ROAS, CPA, CTR per channel and cross-channel, sets fetchStatus flags.

9. Code: Build Chart Data
Formats USD, percentages, counts; builds spendByChannel, ga4ChannelMix, top campaigns structures.

10. Google Sheets: Log KPIs
Appends run to Report_History tab with all KPIs and fetch status for historical tracking.

11. AI Agent: Insights and Summary
Structured 6 section prompt: headline, wins, issues, cross-channel insights, recommended actions, forecast.

12. OpenAI Chat Model
gpt-4o-mini, temperature 0.3, maxTokens 2000, backs the AI Agent.

13. Code: Build HTML Report
Renders styled HTML with KPI cards, campaign tables, GA4 table, and AI insights section.

14. HTTP: HTML to PDF
Posts HTML to PDF service, returns binary pdf_binary, retries 2 times.

15. Google Slides: Create Presentation
Creates a new deck titled with client ID and date range.

16. Google Slides: Add Summary Slide
Appends a summary slide to the new presentation.

17. Gmail: Send Report to Client
Sends HTML body with PDF attachment to client email, retries 2 times.

18. Slack: Notify Team
Posts client, period, headline KPIs, and source status to the team Slack channel.

19. Code: Format Error Alert
Extracts errors from upstream items, packages alert object with execution ID and summary string.

20. Gmail: Error Alert
Emails ops-team@example.com with formatted error HTML.

21. Slack: Error Alert
Posts the same error alert to the ops Slack channel.
